Kirby: Planet Robobot

info

Hoshi no Kirby: Robobo Planet
星のカービィ ロボボプラネット
별의 커비 로보보 플래닛
Kirby of the Stars: Robobo Planet

Platforms: 3DS
Year: 2016
Developed by: HAL Laboratory
Published by: Nintendo

Number of Files: 181
Total Filesize: 511 MB (MP3), 1,628 MB (FLAC)

Total: 5h 31m 511 MB 1,628 MB  

Description

Planet Robobot follows a similar gameplay style to the previous Nintendo 3DS title, Kirby: Triple Deluxe, taking advantage of the system's 3D capabilities by allowing Kirby to move between multiple planes in stages. Like most games in the series, Kirby is able to inhale enemies and spit them out to attack other enemies or swallow them in order to absorb their powers. Additionally, players can gain abilities and items by scanning Amiibo figures. New to this game is a mech suit known as the Robobot Armor that Kirby can pilot, allowing him to destroy certain obstacles, lift heavy objects, and defeat large enemies. Like Kirby, the Robobot Armor can gain variations on these abilities by scanning enemies; this can then be used to attack enemies and solve puzzles. Hidden throughout each level are Code Cubes, which are needed to progress and unlock bonus levels, and collectible stickers which can be used to customise the Robobot Armor.

People who viewed this also viewed

Kirby: Planet Robobot Original Soundtrack (2016)

Kirby: Planet Robobot (3DS) (gamerip) (2016)

Kirby Triple Deluxe (3DS) (gamerip) (2014)

Kirby's Return to Dream Land (Wii) (gamerip) (2011)

KIRBY STAR ALLIES: THE ORIGINAL SOUNDTRACK [Limited Edition] (2019)

Kirby Super Star Ultra (DS) (gamerip) (2008)

Kirby 64: The Crystal Shards (N64) (gamerip) (2000)

Kirby Star Allies (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)

Kirby Super Star (SNES) (gamerip) (1996)

Kirby and the Forgotten Land (Switch) (gamerip) (2022)

Kirby and the Rainbow Curse (Wii U) (gamerip) (2015)

Super Kirby Clash (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)

Mount Everest

05:40 Apr 26th, 2023Offline

Mariogalax

this seems to have a lot more than just Planet Robobot in it. I listened to it and got tracks from:
- Planet robobot (obviously)
- Adventure
- Air Ride
- Canvas Curse
- Super Kirby Clash
- triple deluxe
- dream land 1
- drum dash deluxe
- return to dream land

You forgot Kira Kira Kids! Tracks say "KiraKira4 for example

Mount Everest

05:30 Apr 26th, 2023Offline

Admin

Rename them on your computer, then re-upload to a 3rd party host such as google drive or mega.nz, and post them as an update of this album here
https://downloads.khinsider.com/upload/album?replace=16176

Thx admin!



Admin

06:13 Apr 26th, 2023Offline

Spring Breeze

How do I rename the rips? I reckonize most of them, because I listened to the tracks about 110 times.

Rename them on your computer, then re-upload to a 3rd party host such as google drive or mega.nz, and post them as an update of this album here
https://downloads.khinsider.com/upload/album?replace=16176
